metadata.name: Petition to Drop Course After Deadline

description: A student needs to drop a course after the official drop/add deadline due to a medical emergency.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and the course they wish to drop.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student's enrollment in the course.

nodes.task_description: Explain the petition process for a late withdrawal, including the need for supporting documentation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly outlines the required steps and forms.

nodes.task_description: Provide the student with the official petition form and instructions on where to submit it.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent emails the correct form and submission link to the student.
